title: Guardian Configuration
description: Schema for .guardian.json configuration files used by the Guardian MCP Toolkit

executionMode.description: Execution mode: local runs agents in-process, cloud delegates to AWS Lambda

layers.description: Architectural layer definitions for Clean Architecture validation

name.description: Layer name (e.g. domain, application, infrastructure, presentation)

paths.description: Glob patterns that match files belonging to this layer

allowedDependencies.description: Names of layers this layer is allowed to import from

testConventions.description: File patterns that identify test files

excludePaths.description: Paths to exclude from analysis (e.g. node_modules, dist)
